name: RunnerMonitor

states.name: Runner Health Card
states.description: Top card showing the primary runner's health status as a JSON response. Includes a status badge (Healthy/Unknown/Unreachable), the raw JSON health object, and a Refresh button.

states.name: Running Task Runs
states.description: Full-width card showing active task runs on the runner. Displays a count badge and a table with task run details. Each row has action buttons: Stop, View Output, View Reflection.
states.precondition: At least one task run is active

states.name: Result Panel
states.description: Full-width panel for displaying action results. Shows title (action name) and pre-formatted JSON content with auto-scroll. Appears after any action button is clicked.
states.precondition: An action has been executed via one of the task run buttons

description: Runner Monitor page — shows detailed health of the primary runner (JSON health response), list of running task runs with actions (stop, view output, view reflection), and a result panel for displaying action output.
